entry:
I don't see a Saturday check-in reflection log entry in the provided Notion page content. The page contains the structure and framework for Himbo's guidance, including reference to Track 3 (Internal Work) where "The joy police are loud," but there is no actual dated Saturday check-in reflection log with a Joy Police paragraph to extract.

To provide you with the Joy Police observation text, I would need the actual check-in entry data.
